sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ مَازِنٌ إِلَى المَحَلِّ لِيَرُدَّ قَمِيصًا.
sentences.translation: Mazin je otišao u radnju vratiti košulju.
sentences.translationEn: Mazin went to the shop to return a shirt.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ القَمِيصَ لَمْ يَكُنْ بِالمَقَاسِ الصَّحِيحِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da košulja nije bila prave veličine.
sentences.translationEn: He said the shirt was not the right size.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ البَائِعُ إِنْ كَانَ مَعَهُ الوَصْلُ.
sentences.translation: Prodavač je pitao ima li račun.
sentences.translationEn: The seller asked if he had the receipt.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهُ مَازِنٌ الوَصْلَ وَأَخَذَ القَمِيصَ الجَدِيدَ.
sentences.translation: Mazin mu je dao račun i uzeo novu košulju.
sentences.translationEn: Mazin gave him the receipt and took the new shirt.
